Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Mild hypoglycemia (glucose 69.9 mg/dL) and low total CO₂ (21.6 mmol/L) are noted, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis. Platelet distribution width is elevated, possibly indicating increased platelet size variability, but platelet count is normal. Urinalysis is unremarkable except for low specific gravity, which may reflect dilute urine. No evidence of infection or renal dysfunction. Clinical correlation recommended.
